## What did you try to do?

Describe the workflow or feature you tested.

## What worked well?

Tell us what felt useful, fast or clear.

## What should be improved?

Describe what felt confusing, slow, missing or hard to use.

## Which feature matters most to you?

- AI chat
- Vision Studio
- Image Studio
- Smart commands like `/humanice` or `/x10think`
- Plugging / connected tools
- kazaAI development agent
- Other

## Device/browser

Desktop or mobile? Browser? Screen size if relevant.

## Extra context

Screenshots, examples or links are welcome.
